## Summary


## Validation

- [ ] `python -m pytest`
- [ ] `python -m compileall -q hermes_a2a_bridge tests`
- [ ] `python -m build` when packaging or release files changed
- [ ] Docs updated or not needed
- [ ] File boundary unchanged, or a design doc is linked
- [ ] No secrets, local paths, database files, caches, temp files, or generated build artifacts committed
- [ ] No unsupported A2A conformance claims added
